description: Retrieval gold set for the demo corpus. Each query names the document its answer should come from. Used to measure Hit@k and MRR of /rag/retrieve. Regenerate for your own corpus.

cases.query: How do plants convert carbon dioxide into food?
What is the event horizon of a black hole?
What lies at the center of a black hole?
Where are most volcanoes located on Earth?
What is the Ring of Fire?
How did Roman aqueducts move water across valleys?
What did aqueducts supply to Roman cities?
